summary: Comprehensive testing of iteration 10 features: real API stubs for Google/Facebook/YouTube/Reddit, sync bug fixes (post_id uses internal ID, location_id uses branch_id UUID), review reply saves to DB, comment reply saves to DB, sync endpoints handle errors gracefully, sentiment analysis, demo data seeding, Reviews sentiment filter. All 27 backend tests and all frontend UI tests passed.
critical_code_review_comments: API consistently returns 403 instead of 401 for unauthenticated requests - pre-existing issue from iteration 9 (not introduced in iteration 10). The frontend auth interceptor only handles 401, meaning expired tokens won't auto-redirect to login on 403 response.

review_routes.py: In reply_to_review, the code looks up branch_id via review.get('branch_id') to call get_google_api, but the review document uses 'location_id' as the branch UUID. It should use review.get('location_id') or review.get('branch_id') consistently - this is fine for now since both are stored, but worth noting for consistency.
seed_data_creation: Demo data was seeded and cleared as part of testing. Backend test class seeds and cleans up automatically.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features from iteration 10 work correctly: (1) Backend startup clean - no import errors in review_routes, social_routes, sync_routes. (2) Reviews list endpoint works with branch_id filter. (3) Reply-to-review saves to DB; Google platform API gracefully fails when no real OAuth credentials. (4) Social posts load with correct comment counts. (5) Comment replies save to DB; Facebook/YouTube/Reddit platform APIs gracefully fail without 500. (6) Sync test (GET /sync/test/google) returns 'Connection Issue' UI feedback gracefully. (7) Sync trigger (POST /sync/sync/{platform}) returns 'Sync started' toast and processes in background. (8) Sentiment analysis endpoint updates reviews with sentiment field. (9) Login page has NO demo credentials section (cleaned up). (10) Reviews page has Sentiment filter dropdown with Positive/Negative/Neutral/Mixed options. (11) Post expansion shows comments correctly (post_id sync bug fix confirmed working). Pre-existing issue: API returns 403 not 401 for unauthenticated requests.

rca_of_issues.no_issues_found: All features implemented correctly. Platform API calls gracefully fail (as designed) since no real OAuth tokens are connected in test environment.
